LAW AND MOTION 302, "IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS CURRENTLY CALENDARED IN DEPARTMENTS 301/302 ARE HEREBY VACATED. WHEN THE COURT RESUMES NORMAL OPERATIONS, THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL ANNOUNCE PROCEDURES FOR SETTING HEARING DATES FOR THOSE CASES WHICH HAVE BEEN FULLY BRIEFED. OPPOSITIONS WILL BE DUE BASED ON THE RESCHEDULED HEARING DATE, BUT NOTHING PRECLUDES A PARTY FROM FILING AN OPPOSITION EARLIER." (302)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS IN DEPARTMENT 302 FILED BEFORE JUNE 1, 2020 ARE OFF CALENDAR PURSUANT TO THE COURT'S GENERAL ORDERS. TO RE-SCHEDULE THE HEARING, PLEASE REFER TO THE PUBLIC NOTICE TO RESTORE SERVICES ISSUED ON MAY 27, 2020 AVAILABLE ON THE COURT'S WEBSITE AT HTTPS://SFSUPERIORCOURT.ORG/. (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Clarification Of Order Granting Its Motion To Vacate Judgment Particularly Regarding Return Of Defendants Levied Funds
Off Calendar Apr-10-2020 Off Calendar

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-03-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Sam Dehbozorgi, Esq. of THE FULLMAN FIRM, T:888.922.2367 ext.707, for defendant/moving party, on Court Call;
Andre J. LeLievre, Esq. of the LAW OFFICES OF ANDRE J. LELIEVRE, T:916.929.0130, for plaintiff/opposing party.

RULING: Court held an evidentiary hearing. William Enrique Galdamez, process server, and Blanca Moran were sworn and examined by the Court and counsel. The motion was discussed and argued. At the conclusion of arguments,

DEFENDANT ASTORGA CONSTRUCTION, INC.'s MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is taken under submission by the Court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

Order signed after hearing.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-27-2019 Continued To Jan-03-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andre Lelievre, esq. (916-929-0130 x.251) for Plaintiff via Court Call.
Sam Dehbozorgi, esq. (888-922-2367) of The Fullman Firm for Defendant via Court Call.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court notes there is a clash of declarations under penalty of perjury. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT ASTORGA CONSTRUCTION, INC.'s MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is continued to January 3, 2020 at 9:30am in Dept 302 for evidentiary hearing with server and alleged servee to be present for testimony.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-04-2019 Off Calendar
